programme.title: Desert Law
programme.desc: As the Fourth of July weekend roasts Pima County, fireworks and tempers ignite; on his first July 4th shift, Deputy Cassels investigates an assault at a teen holiday party, while Deputy Allen recalls a foot chase through the desert where she almost became the victim of "friendly fire.".

programme.title: Desert Law
programme.desc: In the unforgiving desert of Pima County, Arizona, Deputy Pool tracks down a reckless driver whose run from the law sparks a pursuit involving multiple units, while Deputy Casillas finds himself in a tense standoff where every move counts.

programme.title: Desert Law
programme.desc: Alcohol plus blistering heat make for a dangerous cocktail in Pima County, AZ; Deputy Tautimez Saavedra confronts a drunk driver threatening his neighbor with a handgun, while Deputy Pool finds a vehicle that may have been involved in a fatal hit-and-run.

programme.title: Desert Law
programme.desc: With Arizona having some of the loosest gun laws in the country, sheriff's deputies in Pima County constantly confront armed suspects; Deputy Reed deals with a pistol-packing argument at a supermarket checkout line, and Deputy Carter is called to a suspected armed home invasion.

programme.title: Desert Law
programme.desc: The darkness of the nighttime desert in Pima County is the perfect cover for crime; Deputy Pool deals with a curious case of identity theft; Deputy Carter clears up a high-speed crash into a cactus, and faced with a tricky traffic stop; Deputy Stewart is forced to make a split-second decision.

programme.title: Desert Law
programme.desc: It's peak summer in Pima County, and an extreme heat warning scorches the desert by day; but when night falls and the temperatures drop, crime surges, sending Deputy Cassels after reckless drivers and Deputy Stewart into the fight against narcotics on the desert streets.

programme.title: Desert Law
programme.desc: In Pima County, AZ, deputies confront ongoing drug-related activity during their patrols; deputies Stewart and Garza arrest a driver and uncover multiple syringes allegedly loaded with heroin; Deputy McCall-Miller recalls the biggest drug bust of his career.

programme.title: Desert Law
programme.desc: The burning summer is finally ending in Pima County, Ariz., but crime doesn't stop; Detective McLeod responds to an attempted abduction, Deputy McCall-Miller stops out with a drunk driver who refuses to admit he's crashed into a utility pole.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.desc: Rachael creates a green and white lasagna, layering mixed greens, cheese, sautéed mushrooms, sauce and more for a truly flavorful dish; John crafts a cocktail called the Inverno Verde.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.desc: Rachael prepares saffron pasta paired with boneless chicken breasts sautéed with saffron, carrots, citrus, fennel and more; John mixes up a blood orange mule made with freshly squeezed blood orange juice and vodka.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: Ravaged by a hurricane and overtaken by nature, a low-cost home in need of low-cost renovation looks like the perfect zombie for the team to do a quick, easy flip, until they discover it's home to some wild reptiles.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: A canal-front home features sunken floors, junk-filled rooms, disgusting bathrooms and an addition that's literally falling off the house, forcing the team to create a new floor plan from scratch.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: The team is on a high-stakes roller coaster gambling on a Zombie with a $100,000 reno; will they hit the jackpot or crash and burn? Meanwhile, a perilous property pushes Keith's driving skills to the limit, sending the project into a tailspin; buckle up for a wild ride!
